## Claim

Bounty:

Operator GitHub handle:

Private contact for payment coordination:

I understand:

- [ ] One active claim per operator.
- [ ] The 48-hour claim fuse starts when this claim is accepted.
- [ ] Payment details must not be posted publicly.
- [ ] Acceptance is binary against the bounty criteria.
- [ ] Submitted scripts, URLs, and PRs may be run in a disposable sandbox.
